response: A UK plug is white and red. Which wall socket should it go into: the round-pin, the flat-pin, or the three-pin socket?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a white red UK plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
